subject: fix(theme): move theme state to Zustand store so all components re-render on switch
body:
useTheme() previously used local useState — each of the ~25 components
calling it got independent copies of isDark and comboId. When SettingsModal
toggled dark mode, only SettingsModal re-rendered. All other components kept
stale colors for inline styles (className-based styling via Uniwind CSS
variables updated correctly, but inline style colors did not).

Fix: Replace useState with a shared Zustand store (useThemeStore). Now when
any component calls toggleMode/setCombo/setDark, the store update triggers
re-renders in ALL components consuming useTheme().colors.

The hook's public API is unchanged — no consumer modifications needed.

Tags: bugfix, theme, zustand, state-management
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
